representation_label: Non-H2 DRI crude steel pathway bundle
description: Direct pathway bundle covering conventional BF-BOF, scrap EAF, and CCS-influenced BF-BOF crude steel while H2 DRI is decomposed.
notes: Required child representation for complete crude-steel coverage under the decomposition pilot.

description: Technology bundle for making DRI from hydrogen, gas, or imported residual supply.

representation_label: DRI melt and refine technology bundle
description: Technology bundle for converting DRI into crude steel through EAF or electric smelter finishing.
notes: Required finishing child representation for the decomposed H2 DRI crude-steel route.
